Name: Average time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants where both activities occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants that include a major revision cycle
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time for First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to be followed by any reviewer assignment activity (e.g., SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Elapsed time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants ending with RW-EIC Accept
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed compared to the time from Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation to RW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average waiting time to SW-Reviewer Agreed after First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation in cases that previously underwent a major revision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total resolution time of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation measured until the next decision point (e.g., SW-Awaiting EIC Decision or SW-EIC Major Revision)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation relative to the preceding Awaiting Assignment to Batch activity
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Cycle Time of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation defined as the duration from its occurrence to the subsequent Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Minimum time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and First Look-Your updates are overdue in prolonged update cycles
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'First Look-Your updates are overdue'

Name: Average time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants that include reminder activities (e.g., Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed in comparison with the total time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Elapsed time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and the final acceptance decision (e.g., RW-EIC Accept) in successful submission paths
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'RW-EIC Accept'

Name: Time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants that involve editor reassignment (e.g., Assign a Different Editor)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'
